zesty-parmesan-breadcrumb-crusted-zucchi.name: Zesty Parmesan-breadcrumb-crusted Zucchini
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 F. Spray an 8-inch or 9-inch round pie dish with pan spray.
Slice the zucchini into 1/8- to 1/4-inch slices. Arrange slices in a shingle fashion from the outside edge of the dish to the center.
Mix together the salt, spices, breadcrumbs, and Parmesan cheese. Stir in the oil to coat all the breadcrumbs.
Sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture over the zucchini. Make sure you get all the nooks and crannies of the zucchini slices.
Place in the oven for 30 to 35 minutes or until the breadcrumbs are golden brown and the zucchini is cooked through.

zucchini-and-rice-pancakes.name: Zucchini And Rice Pancakes

ingredients.item: Cooked leftover rice or any other grain

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium saucepan over medium. Add garlic and cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add tomatoes and oregano and cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced and slightly thickened, about 10 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl and season with salt and pepper.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a small nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add zucchini, season with salt and pepper, and cook, tossing occasionally, until golden and tender, about 4 minutes. Add rice and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil. Cook, stirring occasionally, until rice is crisp, about 3 minutes. Reduce heat to medium and add eggs, tilting skillet to evenly distribute. Cook, undisturbed, until eggs are mostly set, about 1 minute. Invert pancake onto a plate, then slide back into skillet. Cook until golden brown on the second side, about 1 minute more. Let cool slightly before cutting into wedges. Serve with reserved tomato sauce for dipping.
Do Ahead: Tomato sauce can be made up to 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

zucchini-dish-recipe-lezzet.name: Zucchini Dish Recipe
instructions: 1. Light-and-gray the shells of pumpkins; as well as small cubes in the form of chopstick (like in the arbor).
2. Eat onion, yellowish thin coast.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large pot, then add yellowms and roast until pink.
4. Cube add pumpkins and mix 3-4 minutes.
5. Add dilutation (or salcaye), add.
6. U add hot water to the car and close the cover.
7. Bake about 20-25 minutes on the ground fire.
8. After piştikten u sprinkles from the cars.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

zucchini-omelet-recipe-comedera.name: Zucchini Omelet, Recipe
instructions: We'll start with peeling onion and garlic. Then we'll get the first pint into small cubes, and preferably we'll get the second pint (or we'll get the least pint).
In the case of pumpkins, we will wash them up very well, cut them up, and then cut them into thin cuts (but not too bad, so that they do not lose their shape while cooking) or pieces.
At once, we'll heat up a big frying pan with an oil jet at medium heat.
Once the oil's hot, we'll add garlic and onion and let them cook for five minutes, often stirring.

When the onion starts to become slightly clear, we will add pumpkin wheels. We will add a touch of salt and pepper, well distributed onto the plants, and we will let them cook eight more minutes. We will put the fire down slightly (with a medium to low intensity).
Mientras tanto, cascaremos los huevos en un bol, salpimentaremos al gusto y mezclaremos con un batidor manual.
Una vez cocidos los vegetales, los retiraremos del fuego y los escurriremos (de preferencia, con ayuda de un colador). Este paso es importante para no afectar la consistencia de la tortilla.
Acto seguido, incorporaremos los vegetales a los huevos revueltos, y mezclaremos.
In another frying pan (or the same but clear and dry) we will once again warm an oil jet.

When the oil's hot, we're gonna pour out the egg and vegetable mix. Do not abuse the temperature of the fire to prevent the omelette from being cooked only outside. The best thing to do is to use an medium-low fire. With respect to plants, care that they are distributed uniformly into the frying pan.

Let the omelette get low, which should take about five minutes. It slightly moves the frying pan with the handle to size if the whole tortilla piece has been cut sufficiently and is at the point at which you can turn it.
Help with a plate or frying pan to turn the omelette around. Let's get it over with for a few minutes, depending on your taste and how much cooking you care about.
That's all. Serve pumpkin omelette immediately.
